prompt_text: Regenerate this exact sprite sheet action in the same visual style and character identity as reference. Keep silhouette, costume, colors, line style, proportions, and camera angle matching the reference 1:1. Improve only frame consistency and spacing. Output one sprite sheet with evenly spaced frames, full-body visible, no merged frames, no dropped frames, no text, no watermark. Use pure flat chroma green background #00FF00 only, no gradient, no shadows on background, no background texture.
